heading: Definitions
label: 1626 Definitions
text: When used in this chapter, the term “agricultural products” includes agricultural, horticultural, viticultural, and dairy products, livestock and poultry, bees, forest products, fish and shellfish, and any products thereof, including processed and manufactured products, and any and all products raised or produced on farms and any processed or manufactured product thereof, and the term “State” when used in this chapter shall include the Virgin Islands and Guam.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text inserted by , probably means title II of act , which is classified generally to this chapter. For complete classification of title II to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 92–318section 1621 of this titleAug. 14, 1946
Amendments1972— inserted “, and the term ‘State’ when used in this chapter shall include the Virgin Islands and Guam” before period at end.Pub. L. 92–318
